import networkx as nx
import copy

def girvan_newman(graph):
    original_graph = copy.deepcopy(graph)
    current_graph = copy.deepcopy(graph)

    best_modularity = -1.0
    best_partition = None

    if current_graph.number_of_edges() == 0:
        return [{node} for node in current_graph.nodes()] if current_graph.nodes() else []

    while current_graph.number_of_edges() > 0:
        betweenness = nx.edge_betweenness_centrality(current_graph)
        max_edge = max(betweenness, key=betweenness.get)
        current_graph.remove_edge(*max_edge)

        current_partition = [frozenset(c) for c in nx.connected_components(current_graph)]
        
        mod = nx.community.modularity(original_graph, current_partition)
            
        if mod > best_modularity:
            best_modularity = mod
            best_partition = current_partition

    return best_partition
